name: Cato [Feminized Merman]

not intended as an authentic portrayal of a trans/intersex character and i wouldn't rlly consider cato trans/intersex he was born male and still considers himself a man his species just kind of does that it's like jury duty 2 them dont think too much about it

(if you want transgender merfolk that are transgender and not fetishized i got u tho check out Ronan [Spoiled Merman] and Merrick [Sea Witch])

DID YOU KNOW??? many types of eels are protandric sequential hermaphrodites (they begin their life cycles occupying the "male" reproductive role of fertilization, but as they age, begin to develop into the "female" reproductive role of egg production) this is not a scientifically accurate or authentic portrayal of this process, but this IS intentional, because i do not respect fish and if you are a fish i do not respect you or your culture

this marks the end of the series based on this multi-bot. i promise ive got the weird merfolk egg breeding shit out of my system for a little while so i can get back to my business as usual (namely working on some alt scenarios of a few of my fav older high fantasy bots, some more aliens and sci-fi stuff as well)

if you follow me or were in the creators discord 2gether but youre kind of weirded out by this more "out there" stuff please god do NOT @ me just pretend this was all a dream

partially doing this bc i dont like cato btw and he was not a good mate to me and the others in the multi-bot so im like okay wise guy well im forcibly feminizing you
